headline: How The Federated Hermes (FHI) Story Is Shifting With New Targets And Flow Signals
summary: Federated Hermes is back in focus after analysts adjusted their price targets, with one fair value estimate moving to US$55.57 and another high end target shifting to US$60 from US$55. These moves reflect recent research that mixes cautious tweaks, such as JPMorgan’s US$1 cut, with more constructive revisions tied to early reads on asset manager flows. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifts and track the evolving narrative around the stock. Stay updated as the Fair Value...
